examples:
Command Example
!ip ip=7.7.7.7 using-brand="Palo Alto Minemeld"
War Room Output
6. Get file indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified file, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the file indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
file

!ip ip=7.7.7.7 using-brand="Palo Alto Minemeld"
War Room Output
6. Get file indicator
Retrieves all occurrences of the specified file, including the context in which it is found.
For this command to succeed, the miner (associated with the file indicator) has to be on a Cortex XSOAR block list or allow list.
Base Command
file
Input
name: file

outputs.description: The Indicator DBotScore.Type The Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The DBot score vendor DBotScore.Score The DBot score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that defined the file as malicious File.Malicious.Description For malicious files, the reason why the vendor defined the file as malicious
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: Entire indicator object File.MineMeld.Indicators.indicator Indicator value
outputs.name: File.MineMeld.Indicators

outputs.description: Miner of the indicator. File.MineMeld.Indicators.type Indicator type
outputs.name: File.MineMeld.Indicators.miner

outputs.description: Indicator comment MineMeld.Indicators Entire indicator object
outputs.name: File.MineMeld.Indicators.comment

outputs.description: Indicator value MineMeld.Indicators.miner Miner of the indicator
outputs.name: MineMeld.Indicators.indicator

outputs.description: Entire miner object MineMeld.Miner.name Miner name
outputs.name: MineMeld.Miner

outputs.description: MD5 hash of the file File.SHA1 SHA-1 hash of the file
outputs.name: File.MD5
